prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L L-Series V8 (engine code: L675) – forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbochargers (1.4 bar peak boost) with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 60mm external wastegates, and custom 4-inch titanium downpipes by Armytrix for reduced backpressure and optimized scavenging

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2600X injectors, and a custom billet fuel rail by Radium Engineering to support 1,200+ HP on E85 blend

Drivetrain: Reinforced ZF 8HP95X transmission with a Pankl Racing Systems billet input shaft, upgraded clutch pack by Sachs Performance (stage 3), and a Quaife ATB helical LSD with 45% lockup for aggressive power delivery to the rear wheels
estetica: Body: Custom carbon fiber Barchetta Evo aero package by Carbonskins, including a 3D-printed front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via Bentley’s Dynamic Ride system), rear diffuser with integrated titanium strakes, and a removable hardtop with electrochromic glass by SageGlass for adaptive tinting

Wheels: Forged 22-inch 3-piece wheels by HRE Performance (FF16 model) with custom offset (ET25) to clear AP Racing 400mm carbon-ceramic brake rotors, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear) for track-focused grip

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped cockpit by Saddleback Leather, featuring a bespoke digital dash by RaceLogic (VBOX Sport integration), Sparco QRT-R carbon fiber racing seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom titanium roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-certified) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline
